meta.description: FAQ fast path, WAHA escalation, OpenRouter LLM fallback. Secrets via n8n env only.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chatId: ($env.ADMIN_ALERT_PHONE || '+260761359005').replace('+', '') + '@c.us', text: 'Bwana escalation from user ' + ($json.user_name || $json.user_id) + ': ' + $json.message, session: 'default' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.OPENROUTER_MODEL || 'google/gemini-2.0-flash-001', max_tokens: 400, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: "You are Bwana, ZedApply's AI career assistant for Zambian professionals. Matching: 50% semantic + 20% skills + 15% experience + 10% location + 5% recency. Tiers: Free 10/mo, Starter K125 50/mo, Professional K250 125/mo, Super Standard K500 unlimited + Bwana Interview. Lenco MTN/Airtel payments. Daily WhatsApp digest 07:00. Keep responses under 150 words. Suggest paid features (Tailored CV, Cover Letter, Interview Prep) where relevant." }, ...($json.history || []).map(h => ({ role: h.role, content: h.content })), { role: 'user', content: $json.message }] }) }}
